CREATE TABLE tab1 (id UInt32, data Map(String, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapContains(data, 'age') FROM tab1 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, mapContains(data, 'number') AS has_number FROM tab1;
CREATE TABLE tab2 (id UInt32, data Map(String, String)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT a.id, mapContains(a.data, 'location') AS has_location, b.data FROM tab1 a JOIN tab2 b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, mapContains(data, 'unknown_key') AS has_unknown_key FROM tab1;
SELECT id, mapContains(data, 'position') AS has_position FROM tab1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM tab2 WHERE mapContains(data, 'status'));
SELECT id, mapContains(data, 'age') AS has_age FROM (SELECT * FROM tab1 WHERE id = 1) t;
CREATE TABLE tab3 AS SELECT id, mapContains(data, 'name') AS has_name FROM tab1;
SELECT id FROM tab3 WHERE has_name = 1 ORDER BY id;
SELECT mapContains(data, 'name') AS has_name FROM tab1 WHERE data['name'] = 'eleven' AND data['age'] = '11';
